title: MakeHuman Community Licensing
permitted_uses: License-risk assessment for MakeHuman, MPFB, and generated graphics assets.
claims_supported: MakeHuman and MPFB use a split license model.
Core graphics assets are shared under CC0.
MPFB source code is GPL and MakeHuman source code is AGPL.
claims_not_supported: That AGPL/GPL source code can be embedded into OpenClinXR runtime without legal review.
That third-party community assets share the same license as core assets.
